name: Bharatiya Global Infomedia Limited
summary: Bharatiya Global Infomedia Limited provides information technology (IT), and media and entertainment products and services in India. It offers traffic engineering solutions, such as parking management, parking guidance, toll management, ticket dispensing, automatic number plate recognition, under vehicle surveillance, automatic vehicle counter-cum-classifier systems; and facility management solutions comprising smart campus, visitor management, canteen management, asset tracking, laptop tracking, file tracking, and lighting management systems, as well as CCTV, access control, perimeter fencing, etc. The company also provides personnel management solutions consisting of employee tracking, time-attendance, library automation and management, and student information systems; and customized solutions, including automated binning systems, intelligent converters, GSM based mast or I/O controllers, GSM logic controllers, boom barriers, loop detectors, LED panels, and kiosk applications, as well as other customizable converters, counters, etc. In addition, it offers building solutions, such as building management systems, i-BMS systems, energy services, lighting control products, and maintenance services. Further, the company provides home automation for RWA management and jewelry tracking systems. It primarily serves road and transportation, infra and building, health and medical, defense, security and surveillance, and other sectors. The company was formerly known as Bhartiya Global Software Limited and changed its name to Bharatiya Global Infomedia Limited in November 2003. Bharatiya Global Infomedia Limited was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Noida, India.
